component.name: Unikey-Wayland
component.summary: Cross-platform Vietnamese input method for Linux Wayland and Windows

description.p: Unikey-Wayland is a free and open-source Vietnamese input method supporting Linux Wayland desktops and Microsoft Windows.
It is powered by the Bamboo Engine, supports the Telex and VNI input methods, and integrates natively with IBus on Linux while providing a native Windows edition built with Qt 6.
The project is released under the GNU GPL v3 license and is developed publicly on GitHub with automated CI/CD builds.
